title: cephalaria brevipalea
intro: Cephalaria brevipalea, also known as the short-stalked cephalaria or short-stalked cephalaria plant, is a perennial plant in the honeysuckle family native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Cephalaria brevipalea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. Cephalaria brevipalea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
